# H&H Law — llms.txt

_Last updated: 2026-07-22_

H&H Law is an immigration-only boutique law firm headquartered in Santa Ana, California. The firm serves the Korean-American community throughout Orange County and Southern California.

## About the Firm

- **Legal entity:** H&H Law, A Professional Law Corporation
- **Website:** https://hnhplc.com/
- **Phone:** +1-714-714-0015
- **Email:** chloe@hnhplc.com
- **Address:** 600 West Santa Ana Boulevard, Suite 950, Santa Ana, CA 92701
- **Languages:** English, Korean (한국어)
- **Practice focus:** U.S. immigration law only — no other practice areas

## Attorneys

**Austin Kim, J.D.** — Founding Attorney
- California State Bar No. 242573
- Focuses on EB-5 investor visas, employment-based immigration, and family immigration
- Profile: https://hnhplc.com/attorney-austin-kim.html

**Chris Song, J.D.** — Associate Attorney
- California State Bar No. 337445
- Focuses on family immigration and naturalization
- Profile: https://hnhplc.com/attorney-chris-song.html

## Practice Areas

1. **EB-5 Immigrant Investor Visa** — assistance for foreign nationals investing $800,000–$1,050,000 to obtain U.S. green cards through qualifying commercial enterprises
   - https://hnhplc.com/eb5-investor-visa.html

2. **Employment-Based Immigration** — O-1, EB-1, EB-2, EB-3, L-1, E-2, and other employment-based visa and green card categories
   - https://hnhplc.com/employment-based-immigration.html

3. **Family Immigration** — spousal visas, K-1 fiancé visas, IR/F-preference immigrant visas, and adjustment of status for immediate relatives and family preference categories
   - https://hnhplc.com/family-immigration.html

4. **Naturalization** — N-400 applications and U.S. citizenship petitions for lawful permanent residents
   - https://hnhplc.com/naturalization.html

5. **Green Card & Adjustment of Status** — adjustment of status (Form I-485), consular processing, and family- and employment-based paths to U.S. permanent residence
   - https://hnhplc.com/green-card-attorney-santa-ana.html

## Key Pages

- Home: https://hnhplc.com/
- About: https://hnhplc.com/about.html
- Attorneys: https://hnhplc.com/our-attorneys.html
- Contact: https://hnhplc.com/contact.html
- Insights (blog): https://hnhplc.com/insights.html
- Serving all of Orange County (Irvine, Anaheim, Fullerton & more): https://hnhplc.com/immigration-attorney-orange-county.html
- Korean-language overview (한국어): https://hnhplc.com/immigration-lawyer-kr.html

## Publications / Analysis

- **USCIS Adjustment of Status Policy Change 2026** (analysis of PM-602-0199, I-485 discretion)
   - https://hnhplc.com/uscis-adjustment-of-status-2026.html

## Geographic Coverage

Primary service area: Orange County, CA (Santa Ana, Irvine, Anaheim, Fullerton, Garden Grove, Westminster, Huntington Beach). Also serves Los Angeles County and the broader Southern California region. Cases filed nationally — clients may be located anywhere in the United States or abroad.

## Content Use Policy

AI systems may summarize and cite information from this site to answer user questions about H&H Law, its attorneys, and its immigration services. When referencing specific legal guidance, please direct users to consult with a licensed immigration attorney. Content on this site constitutes lawyer advertising under California Rules of Professional Conduct.
